name: PlayerLocation
description: The player's location across all of Myst -- a SINGLE Ego, generated by analysis/gen_player.py from DeMystify's graph.dot (do not hand-edit, regenerate). One state per card (island + the five ages), one 'walks to ...' transition per navigation edge; the linking books are internal moves gated on the corresponding mini-puzzle's Solved state (the A/G seam -- the nav assumes the puzzle's guarantee). CAVEAT: Myst cards conflate physical location with facing and world-state, so these are the reachability graph, not a clean room map. 1358 cards, 3224 transitions.

ATTEMPT_Mechanical.description: attempt the Mechanical mini-puzzle on arrival at its approach card (ClockAcc)

CLUE_Mechanical.description: has the player seen the Mechanical clue? (read-once guard)

READ_Mechanical.description: reading the Mechanical clue -- the knowledge its puzzle needs

ATTEMPT_Stoneship.description: attempt the Stoneship mini-puzzle on arrival at its approach card (PlanAcc)

CLUE_Stoneship.description: has the player seen the Stoneship clue? (read-once guard)

READ_Stoneship.description: reading the Stoneship clue -- the knowledge its puzzle needs

ATTEMPT_Channelwood.description: attempt the Channelwood mini-puzzle on arrival at its approach card (BoilAcc)

CLUE_Channelwood.description: has the player seen the Channelwood clue? (read-once guard)

READ_Channelwood.description: reading the Channelwood clue -- the knowledge its puzzle needs

ATTEMPT_Selenitic.description: attempt the Selenitic mini-puzzle on arrival at its approach card (RktAcc)

CLUE_Selenitic.description: has the player seen the Selenitic clue? (read-once guard)

READ_Selenitic.description: reading the Selenitic clue -- the knowledge its puzzle needs

ATTEMPT_Dunny.description: attempt the Dunny mini-puzzle on arrival at its approach card (FireAcc)

CLUE_Dunny.description: has the player learned the fireplace combination? (gates the attempt)

READ_Dunny.description: learn the fireplace combination at the fireplace (only once a brother's book is complete)

BOOK_Sirrus.description: is Sirrus's book complete? (the freebie + one page per age -> he reveals the combo)

NOTE.description: has the player read Catherine's note (enter the marker count at the imager)?

SWITCH_Dock.description: is the Dock marker switch on?

FLIP_Dock.description: flip the Dock marker switch up

SWITCH_Cabin.description: is the Cabin marker switch on?

FLIP_Cabin.description: flip the Cabin marker switch up

SWITCH_Clock.description: is the Clock marker switch on?

FLIP_Clock.description: flip the Clock marker switch up

SWITCH_Gears.description: is the Gears marker switch on?

FLIP_Gears.description: flip the Gears marker switch up

SWITCH_SpaceShip.description: is the SpaceShip marker switch on?

FLIP_SpaceShip.description: flip the SpaceShip marker switch up

SWITCH_Generator.description: is the Generator marker switch on?

FLIP_Generator.description: flip the Generator marker switch up

SWITCH_Tree.description: is the Tree marker switch on?

FLIP_Tree.description: flip the Tree marker switch up

SWITCH_Planetarium.description: is the Planetarium marker switch on?

FLIP_Planetarium.description: flip the Planetarium marker switch up

TOWER.description: has the imager (Atrus's message) revealed the tower-rotation mechanism? (gates the tower clues)

READ_IMAGER.description: enter the marker count (8) at the imager -- Atrus's message reveals the tower rotation

HANDS.description: are the player's hands full (carrying a page)?

SIRRUS_ADD.description: AddPage -- slot a carried page into Sirrus's book

ATRUS_ADD.description: AddPage -- slot a carried page into Atrus's book

PAGE_FreebieRed.description: the freebie red page by Sirrus's book in the library

triples.event: walks to S-Cache Wine Rack Note #439
walks to A to Hall Shot #502
walks to S to Hall Shot #503
walks to S-Throne Looking in Cache #550
walks to A to Hall Shot #502
walks to S to Hall Shot #503
solve the Mechanical access mini-puzzle (ClockAcc) -- glossed; the sub-puzzle is proven standalone
take the Myst linking book back from Mechanical
solve the Stoneship access mini-puzzle (PlanAcc) -- glossed; the sub-puzzle is proven standalone
take the Myst linking book back from Stoneship
solve the Channelwood access mini-puzzle (BoilAcc) -- glossed; the sub-puzzle is proven standalone
take the Myst linking book back from Channelwood
solve the Selenitic access mini-puzzle (RktAcc) -- glossed; the sub-puzzle is proven standalone
take the Myst linking book back from Selenitic
solve the Dunny access mini-puzzle (FireAcc) -- glossed; the sub-puzzle is proven standalone
take the Myst linking book back from Dunny
read the Mechanical clue (the tower, gear marker)
read the Stoneship clue (the tower, boat marker)
read the Channelwood clue (the tower, tree marker)
read the Selenitic clue (the tower, space marker)
learn the fireplace combination (a brother's book is complete)
place the Mechanical page in Sirrus's book
place the Stoneship page in Sirrus's book
place the Channelwood page in Sirrus's book
place the Selenitic page in Sirrus's book
pick up the Stoneship white-page half
restore the Stoneship white-page half into Atrus's green book
pick up the Channelwood white-page half
restore the Channelwood white-page half into Atrus's green book
pick up the freebie red page (by Sirrus's book)
place the freebie red page in Sirrus's book
read Catherine's note (enter the marker-switch count at the imager)
flip the Dock marker switch up
flip the Cabin marker switch up
flip the Clock marker switch up
flip the Gears marker switch up
flip the SpaceShip marker switch up
flip the Generator marker switch up
flip the Tree marker switch up
flip the Planetarium marker switch up
enter the marker count (8) at the imager -- Atrus's message reveals the tower rotation
triples.guard: note = NOTE.Seen /\ dockSwitch = SWITCH_Dock.On /\ cabinSwitch = SWITCH_Cabin.On /\ clockSwitch = SWITCH_Clock.On /\ gearsSwitch = SWITCH_Gears.On /\ spaceshipSwitch = SWITCH_SpaceShip.On /\ generatorSwitch = SWITCH_Generator.On /\ treeSwitch = SWITCH_Tree.On /\ planetariumSwitch = SWITCH_Planetarium.On /\ towerRevealed = TOWER.Unseen
